title: 2025-10-01 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 3.37
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-10-01: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 3.37/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-10-01, the score printed 3.37/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
